mapper.select:
SELECT dr.id, dr.report_date AS reportDate, dr.user_id AS userId, u.real_name AS userRealName, dr.new_customer_count AS newCustomerCount, dr.follow_up_count AS followUpCount, dr.progress_advance_count AS progressAdvanceCount, dr.task_completed_count AS taskCompletedCount, dr.progress_details AS progressDetails, dr.task_completed_details AS taskCompletedDetails, dr.summary, dr.issues, dr.tomorrow_plan AS tomorrowPlan FROM daily_reports dr LEFT JOIN users u ON dr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE dr.is_deleted = 0
AND dr.user_id IN
#{uid}
ORDER BY dr.report_date DESC, dr.id DESC

SELECT dr.id, dr.report_date AS reportDate, dr.user_id AS userId, u.real_name AS userRealName, dr.new_customer_count AS newCustomerCount, dr.follow_up_count AS followUpCount, dr.progress_advance_count AS progressAdvanceCount, dr.task_completed_count AS taskCompletedCount, dr.progress_details AS progressDetails, dr.task_completed_details AS taskCompletedDetails, dr.summary, dr.issues, dr.tomorrow_plan AS tomorrowPlan FROM daily_reports dr LEFT JOIN users u ON dr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE dr.is_deleted = 0 AND dr.report_date = #{date} AND dr.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT dr.id, dr.report_date AS reportDate, dr.user_id AS userId, u.real_name AS userRealName, dr.new_customer_count AS newCustomerCount, dr.follow_up_count AS followUpCount, dr.progress_advance_count AS progressAdvanceCount, dr.task_completed_count AS taskCompletedCount, dr.progress_details AS progressDetails, dr.task_completed_details AS taskCompletedDetails, dr.summary, dr.issues, dr.tomorrow_plan AS tomorrowPlan FROM daily_reports dr LEFT JOIN users u ON dr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE dr.is_deleted = 0 AND dr.id = #{id}
